evidence: frontmatter name is 'claude-devtools:markdown-search' but file is markdown-search-logic.md; all 4 sibling commands in the same directory have name: matching their filename exactly
description: Command frontmatter name does not match its path-derived identity
suggested_fix: Rename frontmatter to 'claude-devtools:markdown-search-logic' or rename the file to markdown-search.md, whichever matches actual invocation intent

evidence: chown root:root and chmod 4755 (SUID) applied to /opt/${productFilename}/chrome-sandbox in the .deb afterInstall hook
description: Post-install hook grants SUID root on chrome-sandbox binary; this is the documented, standard Electron Linux sandbox fix (electron/electron#17972), path is not attacker-controlled
suggested_fix: No code fix needed; optionally document the rationale in SECURITY.md

evidence: process.env.APPLE_ID / APPLE_APP_SPECIFIC_PASSWORD / APPLE_TEAM_ID passed to notarize() which calls Apple's notarytool service over the network
description: Build script reads Apple signing credentials from env and sends them to Apple's official notarization service
suggested_fix: No code fix needed; ensure credentials are only ever provided via CI secrets, never logged
